name: Installed Programs (Uninstall Registry)
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Complete list of installed software with DisplayName, DisplayVersion, InstallDate, InstallLocation, and UninstallString. Covers 64-bit, 32-bit, and per-user installations across three registry paths.
forensic_value: Authoritative installed software list — InstallDate reveals when software appeared on the system. Software installed just before an incident is highly relevant. UninstallString reveals where the binary lives. Attacker tools that run an installer leave entries here (TeamViewer, AnyDesk, RMM tools unless portable).
